## Description
<!-- Brief description of what this PR does -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code compiles cleanly (`go build ./...`)
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests that cover my changes
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`go test ./... -race`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] No secrets or API keys are included in this PR

## Test Evidence
<!-- Paste test output or describe how you tested -->
```
go test ./... -v
```

## Security Considerations
<!-- Any security implications of this change? -->
- [ ] No new external dependencies added
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] RBAC permissions unchanged (or documented)
